meta.title: First-Ever Film Made Entirely with Artificial Intelligence
meta.description:
This is the first film created entirely with Artificial Intelligence: every image, sound, and dialogue was generated by AI—no actors, cameras, or sets needed. 

Discover how this groundbreaking technology opened the door to a new way of filmmaking, pushing the boundaries of human and artificial creativity. Subscribe for more innovative content and join me on this journey into the future of cinema.

Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

The tools the computer use to create the movie:
Stable Diffusion:
https://stability.ai/blog/stable-diffusion-public-release
Open A.I. GPT-3 playground:
https://beta.openai.com/playground
Open A.I. Jukeboxhttps://openai.com/blog/jukebox/


C O N T A C T:
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
